arts.ttl: Premier League break silence after minister's Newcastle United ownership test claim
arts.sum: The Premier League have claimed a government minister was 'unable to confirm' if Saudi Arabia's Crown Prince would have to undergo the independent football regulator's owners' and directors' test. On an evening when Newcastle United were namechecked a whopping 20 times inside the chamber, Lord Moynihan asked Baroness Twycross, the parliamentary under-secretary of state at the department for culture, media and sport, if Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman would be subject to an ownership test during a House of Lords debate on the football governance bill a couple of months ago.

arts.sum: Newcastle could end their 70-year wait for a major trophy if they beat Liverpool in the Carabao Cup final, with Shay Given seeing similarities between Eddie Howe and Sir Bobby Robson

arts.ttl: Forget Isak and Haaland, Newcastle are better than Man City in a vital area
arts.sum: It's no surprise to see two men dominate the discussion ahead of Newcastle United's Premier League clash at Manchester City this weekend. Let's be clear, Man City have some big injury issues and will be without world-class talent in Rodri, Manu Akanji and potentially Jack Grealish this weekend.

arts.sum: There’s still plenty of the 24/25 season to play, but Newcastle have already been given encouragement regarding one of their summer targets, Bryan Mbeumo.
